context_note: Japan vs Tunisia, WC2026. Japan moderate-to-strong favorite: λ_JPN=1.930, λ_TUN=0.679. FTR: Japan 66.01%, Draw 22.01%, Tunisia 12.05%. Draw=22.01% well below 25% — RULE8 does NOT fire. RULE7 does NOT fire (Japan 66%, not >86%). Moderate mismatch match. Tunisia 12% → RULE15 applies to Tunisia's primary forwards (Mastouri, Saad). Skhiri is CDM — partial RULE15. Japan plays technical attacking football vs organized Tunisia defense. Key players: Kubo (Japan AM), Skhiri (Tunisia CDM). FTR prices fetched from test call at 23:05 UTC (1 call used). All 19 remaining market calls used for priority data.

Player_SOT_OU0_5.note: All player markets illiquid (offer-only, x0.945 applied)

rules_applied.NO_RULE8: Draw=22.01% well below 25% threshold. Normal estimation applies.
rules_applied.NO_RULE7: Japan 66.01% — not a blowout-level mismatch. RULE7 does NOT fire.
rules_applied.RULE15_TUN_forwards: Tunisia 12.05% win — strong RULE15 territory. Mastouri/Saad/Chaouat as primary forwards get SOT/goal suppressed. Skhiri is CDM (partial RULE15: positional role limits attacking output independently; tiny chasing bump from deep deficit).
rules_applied.Q1_fouls_proxy: Most cards TUN=50.29% >> JPN=27.76%. TUN OU1.5 cards Over=50.77%. Defensive underdog fouls more to break up play; foul rate exceeds card rate. P(Japan more fouls) ≈ 0.25.
rules_applied.Q2_skellam_SOT_2H: λ_JPN_SOT_2H=2.576, λ_TUN_SOT_2H=1.430. Skellam z=-0.573, P(TUN>JPN continuous)=0.284. Discrete correction -3.5pp → 0.248. Japan dominates 2H (2H result JPN=53.1%). Round to 0.25.
rules_applied.Q3_JPN_2plus_offsides: Japan is attacking favorite (not defensive-underdog 2+ offsides family). λ_JPN_goals=1.93 → λ_JPN_off≈1.5. P(≥2|1.5)=0.44. Tunisia sits deep = fewer effective offside traps. Slight NO lean. Estimate 0.45.
rules_applied.Q5_Tunisia_wins: FTR market TUN=0.1205. RULE1: trust liquid market directly. Q5=0.12.
rules_applied.Q6_2_or_fewer_goals: OU2.5 Under=0.5393 direct market. P(total goals ≤2)=0.54.
rules_applied.Q7_5plus_corners_2H: λ_1H_corners=4.11 (from 1H OU3.5 Over=0.5873), λ_JPN_corners=5.57 (from JPN OU5.5 Over=0.4823), λ_TUN_corners=3.97 (Skellam from most_corners=0.6979). λ_total=9.53, λ_2H=5.42. P(≥5|5.42)=0.630.
rules_applied.Q8_Japan_scores_2H: Direct 2H JPN OU0.5 Over=0.6461. Trust market. Q8=0.65.
rules_applied.Q9_Skhiri_CDM: Market illiq 0.175 (offer×0.945). Skhiri is CDM — not primary forward, less RULE15 than striker. TUN 12% → strong suppression expected. Tiny chasing bump. Estimate 0.18.
rules_applied.Q10_Kubo_JPN_winner: Market illiq 0.5798. Kubo is Japan's key attacking MF. Japan expected winner → no RULE15. Trust market. Estimate 0.58.

Q1_JPN_more_fouls_than_TUN.note: NO lean. TUN as defensive underdog fouls more. Most cards: TUN=50.3% vs JPN=27.8%. TUN cards OU1.5 Over=50.8%. Fouls skewed even further toward defensive underdog than cards (many fouls go unbookied). Strong edge if crowd prices ~0.45-0.50.

Q2_TUN_more_SOT_than_JPN_in_2H.note: NO lean. Skellam P(TUN>JPN SOT in 2H)=0.248 (discrete). λ_JPN_SOT_2H=2.58 >> λ_TUN_SOT_2H=1.43. Japan dominates 2H (2H result JPN=53.1%). Tunisia will be defending the majority of 2H.

Q3_JPN_2plus_offsides.note: SLIGHT NO lean. Japan is attacking favorite — NOT the defensive-underdog 2+ offsides family. λ_JPN_goals=1.93 → λ_JPN_off≈1.4-1.6. P(≥2|1.5)≈0.44. Tunisia sits in a deep block = fewer offside traps triggered. Crowd likely prices ~0.50.

Q4_penalty_or_red_card.note: NO lean. P(pen)=0.2715 (direct), P(red)=0.1457 (direct). Independence: P(pen OR red)=1-(0.7478×0.8623)=0.355. Both markets liquid.

Q5_Tunisia_wins.note: FTR market Tunisia=0.1205 (liquid). RULE1: avg(crowd, market). Crowd IS the market for liquid FTR. Q5=0.12.

Q6_2_or_fewer_total_goals.note: Direct OU2.5 Under=0.5393. Trust the market. λ_total=2.608; match expected to be relatively low-scoring despite Japan dominance (Tunisia sits deep, limits scoring opportunities).

Q7_5plus_corners_in_2H.note: Model: λ_2H_corners_total=5.42 (from λ_total=9.53 minus λ_1H=4.11). P(≥5|5.42)=0.630. Japan dominates corners (69.8% most corners). YES lean — Japan will press Tunisia's half in 2H.

Q8_Japan_scores_in_2H.note: Direct 2H JPN OU0.5 Over=0.6461. Trust the market. Japan expected to dominate 2H (2H result JPN=53.1%).

Q9_Skhiri_SOT.note: Market illiq 0.175 (offer-only ×0.945). Skhiri is Tunisia's CDM (not primary forward). TUN 12% win → RULE15 territory, but CDM positional role limits attacking output independently. Tiny upward push for chasing effect. Estimate 0.18. LOW confidence (illiquid only).

Q10_Kubo_SOT.note: Market illiq 0.5798 (offer-only ×0.945). Kubo (Real Sociedad) is Japan's key attacking midfielder. Japan expected winner → no RULE15. Trust market directly. λ_Kubo≈0.87. Estimate 0.58.
